option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="32dp" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/menu_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="48dp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardNotes" android:layout_width="220dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardElevation="6dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="?attr/colorPrimary">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" android:contentDescription="@string/menu_notes" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:tint="?attr/colorOnPrimary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/menu_notes" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleLarge" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" android:gravity="center" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/menu_notes_desc" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" android:gravity="center" android:alpha="0.8" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/welcomeFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/welcomeFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.WelcomeFragment" android:label="Welcome" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_welcome">
<action android:id="@+id/action_welcomeFragment_to_noteListFragment" app:destination="@id/noteListFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim" app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/noteListFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.NoteListFragment" android:label="Notes" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_note_list">
<action android:id="@+id/action_noteListFragment_to_noteEditFragment" app:destination="@id/noteEditFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim" app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim" app:popEnterAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_enter_anim" app:popExitAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_exit_anim" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/noteEditFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.NoteEditFragment" android:label="Edit Note" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_note_edit">
<argument android:name="noteId" app:argType="integer" android:defaultValue="-1" />
</fragment>
</navigation>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/welcomeFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/welcomeFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.WelcomeFragment" android:label="Welcome" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_welcome">
<action android:id="@+id/action_welcomeFragment_to_menuFragment" app:destination="@id/menuFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim" app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/menuFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.MenuFragment" android:label="Menu" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_menu">
<action android:id="@+id/action_menuFragment_to_noteListFragment" app:destination="@id/noteListFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim" app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim" app:popEnterAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_enter_anim" app:popExitAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_exit_anim" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/noteListFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.NoteListFragment" android:label="Notes" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_note_list">
<action android:id="@+id/action_noteListFragment_to_noteEditFragment" app:destination="@id/noteEditFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim" app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim" app:popEnterAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_enter_anim" app:popExitAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_exit_anim" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/noteEditFragment" android:name="com.example.noteapp.ui.notes.NoteEditFragment" android:label="Edit Note" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_note_edit">
<argument android:name="noteId" app:argType="integer" android:defaultValue="-1" />
</fragment>
</navigation>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">NoteApp</string> <string name="title_hint">Title</string> <string name="body_hint">Body</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="add_note">Add note</string> <string name="title_required">Title is required</string> <string name="no_notes">No notes yet. Tap + to create one.</string> <string name="welcome_title">Welcome to Note App</string> <string name="welcome_hint">Please touch the screen to start</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">NoteApp</string> <string name="title_hint">Title</string> <string name="body_hint">Body</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="add_note">Add note</string> <string name="title_required">Title is required</string> <string name="no_notes">No notes yet. Tap + to create one.</string> <string name="welcome_title">Welcome to Note App</string> <string name="welcome_hint">Please touch the screen to start</string> <string name="menu_title">Main Menu</string> <string name="menu_notes">Notes</string> <string name="menu_notes_desc">Create and manage your notes</string> </resources>
